title: Public procurement procedure to be switched up in Latvia
summary_full: A comprehensive and long-awaited reform will be implemented in the public procurement system, which is expected to save at least 2–4% of public procurement expenditures. This is provided for in the amendments to the Public Procurement Law, which were adopted by the Saeima in their final reading on Thursday, May 14, LSM.lv reported.
